design_philosophy: A modern, mobile-first marketplace UI heavily inspired by OfferUp and Pinterest. Content (product images) is the absolute hero. Clean white backgrounds, tight structural grids, and two highly intentional colors: Bright Mint Green for trust/freshness and Vibrant Orange exclusively for high-intent actions.

primary.usage: Brand identity, trusted UI elements, subtle accents, active states, 'Chatear' button.

accent.usage: Exclusively for primary conversion buttons: 'Publicar' (+), 'Hacer Oferta', 'Comprar'.

background.usage: White background mostly. Secondary used for separation or light card backgrounds.

headings.usage: Product titles, section headers, big prices.

body.usage: Descriptions, locations, timestamps, regular UI text.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the images to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.category_icons: flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto snap-x pb-4 scrollbar-hide

buttons.primary_action: bg-[#FF6B00] hover:bg-[#E65A00] text-white rounded-full font-bold py-3 px-6 shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary_action: bg-[#05C46B] hover:bg-[#04A057] text-white rounded-full font-bold py-3 px-6 shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#05C46B] text-[#05C46B] rounded-full font-bold py-3 px-6 transition-transform active:scale-95

cards.product: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex flex-col

inputs.search: w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full py-3 px-5 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-500 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#05C46B]/50

components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-around items-center h-16 pb-safe z-50

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' in kebab-case format.

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop as a mobile-first responsive layout (max-width containers on desktop).
Use Lucide-React for all icons. Ensure icons in the category scroller are circular, inside a light gray/mint-tinted circle background.
Implement the home screen with a top Location selector ('¿Dónde estás? [ Maldonado ▾ ]'), followed by a large search bar, horizontal category scrolling list, and a 2-column masonry or grid feed.
Cards in feed MUST have: full-width image, price (bold), and location/time (small gray text).

Product Detail Page MUST have: large image carousel, title, price, description, seller profile snippet with 5-star rating, and a sticky bottom bar with two CTAs: 'Chatear' (Mint Outline or Mint Solid) and 'Hacer Oferta' (Vibrant Orange Solid).
Ensure 'Vibrant Orange' is STRICTLY reserved for the most important actions ('Hacer Oferta', 'Comprar', 'Publicar' Floating Action Button or Bottom Nav center).
Follow the typography strictly: Outfit for headings, DM Sans for body.
No dark mode required as the brand requires a clean, well-lit white environment.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and clickable cards.
